LanguageData.ZIR_RecoveryMoment_Text: {0} has been working hard to rediscover themselves. Something is returning — a skill, a memory, a piece of who they were. They are emerging from {1}.
LanguageData.ZIR_RecoveryDialog_Desc: {0} is clawing their way back. Choose what returns to them.
LanguageData.ZIR_RecoveryDialog_NoTrait: Nothing yet — it's enough to remember this much
LanguageData.ZIR_RecoveryDialog_PickPassion: Choose a passion to restore first
